source: Library of Congress, Prints & Photographs Division
license: No known restrictions on publication (public domain — pre-1928)
title: Muir Glacier (in Hoonah territory), circa 1910
description: Circa-1910 sepia photograph of the face of Muir Glacier in what is today Glacier Bay National Park. The caption identifies it as 'in Hoonah territory,' documenting the Huna Tlingit's historical relationship with the Glacier Bay fjords before modern park boundaries. Muir Glacier has since retreated dramatically.
alt: Sepia circa-1910 photograph of the Muir Glacier face across calm water
